runTitle: Manual Cloud Run QA - Z.AI GLM Vision fallback live smoke

skippedSurfaces: Gemini Vision primary retest (already verified in QA-20260519-0538)

aiLatencyObservations.surface: Cloud Run Vision fallback image smoke

expertAssessments.rationale: 사용자 명시 요청에 따라 Vision 실이미지 live smoke를 1회만 실행했고 provider/model metadata로 fallback 동작을 검증했다.
runtime provider toggle 전후 상태를 확인했고 smoke 후 모든 provider toggle과 availability가 원복되었다.

artifacts.label: Vision smoke input: existing Playwright QA screenshot
artifacts.note: Reused existing durable input image for non-counting manual GLM fallback smoke to avoid additional evidence storage.

completedImprovements.title: Z.AI GLM Vision fallback 실제 이미지 입력 live smoke 확인
completedImprovements.evidence: gemini toggle=false 상태에서 Cloud Run /api/ai/supervisor가 provider=zai, modelId=glm-4.6v-flash, finalAgent=Vision Agent, success=true로 응답.

notes: Manual-only Vision QA policy respected: one existing Playwright PNG image was used and no provider matrix was run.
Before smoke all providers were available. During smoke gemini=false and zai=true. After smoke all providers were restored to true/available.
Result: HTTP 200, success=true, finalAgent=Vision Agent, provider=zai, modelId=glm-4.6v-flash, mode=multi, modeSelectionSource=vision_input.
Response preview: OpenManager AI 시스템에서 cache-redis-dc1-01 서버의 CPU 71%, 메모리 92%가 높은 경고 상태로 표시되고 있습니다.
The response-quality flags are generic section-presence flags and are not blocking for this short one-sentence Vision provider smoke.
